lift_can.instruction: Pick up the can and place it in the basket.

lift_bottle.instruction: Pick up the bottle and place it upright.

insert_tube.instruction: Insert the tube into the connector.

insert_hole.instruction: Insert the peg into the hole.

insert_HDMI.instruction: Insert the HDMI cable into the port.

pull_out_key.instruction: Pull the key out of the lock.

put_bottle_in_shelf.instruction: Place the bottle on the shelf.

grasp_classify.instruction: Grasp the object and classify its texture.
